en: Traffic safety measures must follow traffic regulations and include signs and barriers to protect workers.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 109(1)
High-visibility protective clothing must be provided for roadwork personnel exposed to traffic.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 109(2)
Outdoor traffic routes and areas safe for walking or driving and not endangering nearby employees must be ensured.\nEmployee Protection Act, Section 24(3)\nWorkplace Ordinance, Section 2(3), 3(2)(1)
Traffic routes must be designed and maintained in such a way that they can be safely walked or driven on according to their intended purpose.\nEmployee Protection Act, Section 24(3)
A clear height of at least 2.0 meters must be maintained for traffic routes.\nWorkplace Ordinance, Section 2(4), 3(3)
